title: Sunken
description: Make the Sunken and Withered Nautilus from Mogswamp's 2026 April Fools Day video real... like they always have been!
body:
## Sunken

![The Sunken Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/22b3cac9b2e76ad417581ce18139e1f49adaafaf.png)

When a nautilus jockey is struck by lightning, the drowned is transformed into The Sunken and the zombie nautilus is transfromed into The Withered nautilus. 

When riding The Withered nautilus, using the charge attack on players or other mobs applies the wither effect. 

Get your lightning rods out, or start swimming during a storm to get these cool mobs!

Check out the short featuring this project here: https://www.youtube.com/shorts/5uBPFT-ecyA

Resource pack only version available here: https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/sunken-cit

---
